overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a hooded character standing on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast mountain landscape during golden hour. Dramatic sun rays pierce through scattered clouds illuminating a snow-capped peak and tranquil lake below, with birds occasionally flying across the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff overlook with panoramic mountain vista

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky from left to right above the mountain peak
character shifts weight and turns slightly to the left, adjusting stance on the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: standing still on the cliff edge, gazing out at the mountain vista with occasional subtle shifts in posture and weight distribution

entered.detail: tall mountain with snow-covered summit dramatically illuminated by golden sunlight breaking through clouds
rolling mountain slopes extending to the left horizon with layered ridges
rocky mountain formations extending to the right with forested lower slopes
calm reflective lake surface visible in the valley below the mountains
stone outcrop where the character stands, overlooking the steep drop to the valley
vertical wooden stake or marker on the left side of the frame

segments.scene_description: A hooded character stands on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast mountain landscape during golden hour. The snow-capped central peak is dramatically backlit by sun rays piercing through scattered clouds, with a tranquil lake visible in the valley below. Birds occasionally fly across the sky as the character subtly shifts position, taking in the panoramic vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady, cinematic gaze from a rocky precipice that emphasizes the immense scale of a mountain wilderness during the golden hour. It begins with a hooded character standing on the cliff's edge, overlooking a vast landscape where a snow-capped central peak is dramatically backlit by sun rays piercing through scattered clouds. As the character subtly shifts position to take in the panoramic vista, the camera reveals a tranquil lake nestled in the valley below. The scene then expands to encompass the wide horizon, where birds occasionally fly across the sky, further accentuating the stillness and grandeur of the environment.
